summary: Excel Import and Party Report features fully tested. All 14 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend UI tests PASSED - Excel Import button visible (admin only), Local Party Report dialog with running balance, Print button, summary cards all working correctly.

1_party_report_api.description: Returns party report with transactions and running balance

5_excel_import_auto_cash_book.description: Entries with cash_paid auto-create Cash Book nikasi entries

6_excel_import_auto_diesel.description: Entries with diesel_paid auto-create Diesel Account entries

7_sample_file_detection.description: Sample file /tmp/sample.xlsx detected with entries and columns

8_frontend_excel_import_button_admin.description: Excel Import button (indigo) visible only for admin users, next to PDF export button

9_frontend_excel_import_button_staff.description: Excel Import button is HIDDEN for staff users (admin only feature)

elements_verified: Date-wise ledger table with columns: #, Date, Description, Source, Debit, Payment, Balance
Summary: Total Debit Rs.8,000, Total Paid Rs.2,000, Balance Rs.6,000
Summary cards: Total Debit (orange), Total Paid (green), Balance (red)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Excel Import and Party Report features tested in iteration 27. Key APIs: POST /api/entries/import-excel (multipart form, supports preview_only=true/false), GET /api/local-party/report/{party_name} (returns running balance). Excel Import is admin-only (visible on Entries tab toolbar). Party Report dialog accessible from Local Party tab via Report/Print button on party cards. Running balance calculates correctly. Test data created for 'TestParty1' in KMS 2024-2025.

api_summary.GET /api/local-party/report/{party_name}: Party report with running balance, total_debit, total_paid, balance
api_summary.POST /api/entries/import-excel: Import Excel file, preview_only=true for preview, preview_only=false for actual import with auto Cash Book and Diesel entries
